question:
Will SK Puntigamer Sturm Graz win on 2025-11-27?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 27, 2025
If SK Puntigamer Sturm Graz wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.uefa.com/

That's the main reason why I'm putting them so high, but they also have a lot of gems that are not talked about enough. But one that I [...] fans of this club might be very optimistic for them this season. Similar to Ludo Gordets, this club constantly dominates domestically. evidences.content: Sturm Graz, Malmö FF, and Ferencvaros all have a 0.3% chance of winning the competition this season. Utrecht have reached the first proper stage of a European competition for the first time since the 2010-11 season, when they finished bottom of a group in the Europa League that included Liverpool and Napoli. They came fourth in the Eredivisie last season and will hope to surprise a few, though the supercomputer doubts they’ll go all the way (0.2%). Only one team competing in the Europa League this season failed to win it across the Opta supercomputer’s 10,000 simulations: Go Ahead Eagles. Who will actually end up with the prize in May? We’ll all have to wait and see. [...] The tournament increased from 32 to 36 teams last season as all three major European competitions underwent a significant format change, and that continues this season. It all begins with a single league stage in which all clubs play eight matches in one massive 36-club table. Finishing in the top eight ensures immediate qualification for the last 16, while the teams between ninth and 24th contest the Europa League play-off round for the right to join the leading sides in the knockout stage. evidences.title: UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 Table, Results, Stats and Fixtures
evidences.content: Founded in 1971, the UEFA Europa League (formerly the UEFA Cup) is a continental club competition in Europe. The competition runs from September to May, and in the group stage teams feature in a group of four and play each other home and away, with the top two progressing to the knockout stage. Thereafter, the 32 teams remaining take part in a knockout tournament until the winner is crowned in the final. Qualification for the competition comes via league placement, and in some cases domestic cup victories, from the previous season, while qualifying rounds take place before the group stage for unseeded teams. One hundred and ninety-eight different clubs have competed since its inception in the Europa League format, with Sevilla winning the most titles. Over the old UEFA Cup and the Europa [...] the most titles. Over the old UEFA Cup and the Europa League, the competition’s all-time leading goalscorer is Henrik Larsson. evidences.title: Dr. Sturm - Cornerstone Dermatology & Surgery Group
evidences.content: Prior to joining Cornerstone Dermatology, Dr. Sturm completed her Dermatology Residency at the University of Kansas Medical Center, where she distinguished herself as the Chief Academic Resident during her final year (2023-2024). Dr. Sturm's academic journey began at Bradley University, where she graduated summa cum laude with a Bachelor of Science in Biology and a minor in Chemistry. She then earned her medical degree from Southern Illinois University School of Medicine. Dr. Sturm’s interests extend beyond medicine, and she loves anything that gets her outside. (Always with sunscreen, of course!) She enjoys hiking, snowboarding, biking, and kayaking, as well as creative pursuits like knitting and crochet.
